name: SiriusPoint Ltd
business: SiriusPoint is a global specialty underwriter of insurance and reinsurance, headquartered in Bermuda. We have licenses to write property, casualty, and accident & health insurance and reinsurance globally. Our business benefits from a global multi-channel distribution network.

exposures.sentence: SiriusPoint is a global specialty underwriter of insurance and reinsurance.

catalysts.event: Deconsolidation of Armada after sale closed
catalysts.sentence: Effective November 1, 2025, we deconsolidated Armada when the transaction closed following the satisfaction of customary closing conditions.
Pursuant to the agreement, our control of Assist America is effective as of January 1, 2026.
On January 30, 2026, the transaction closed following the satisfaction of customary closing conditions.

catalysts.event: Redemption of Series B preference shares
catalysts.sentence: we will redeem all 8,000,000 of our issued and outstanding 8.0% Series B preference shares on February 26, 2026.

catalysts.event: Initial closing of World Nomads acquisition expected
catalysts.sentence: An initial closing on the majority of the World Nomads business is expected to occur in the second or third quarter of 2026, and a final closing is expected to occur in the second half of 2027, subject to receipt of regulatory approvals and satisfaction of other customary closing conditions.
